sentences.sentence: After years in the wilderness, the term 'artificial intelligence' (AI) seems poised to make a comeback.
sentences.translation: 经历多年的沉寂后，“人工智能”（AI）一词似乎准备重新流行起来。

structure.text: After years in the wilderness
the term 'artificial intelligence' (AI)
seems poised to make a comeback

difficult_points: After 短语说明经历的时间。
be poised to 表示“准备好或很可能做某事”。

sentences.sentence: AI was big in the 1980s but vanished in the 1990s.
sentences.translation: 人工智能在20世纪80年代很盛行，但在90年代销声匿迹。

structure.text: AI
was big in the 1980s but vanished in the 1990s

difficult_points: was big 是口语表达，表示很流行。
but 连接两个相反的历史状态。

sentences.sentence: It re-entered public consciousness with the release of AI, a movie about a robot boy.
sentences.translation: 随着电影《人工智能》的上映，AI重新进入公众意识；这部电影讲述了一个机器人男孩的故事。

structure.text: It
re-entered public consciousness with the release of AI
a movie about a robot boy

difficult_points: It 指 artificial intelligence。
a movie...是对 AI 的同位语说明。

sentences.sentence: This has ignited public debate about AI, but the term is also being used once more within the computer industry.
sentences.translation: 这引发了公众对人工智能的讨论，但该词也再次在计算机行业内部被使用。

structure.text: This has ignited public debate about AI
but the term is also being used once more within the computer industry

difficult_points: This 指电影上映及其引发的关注。
is being used 是现在进行时被动，表示正在重新使用。

sentences.sentence: Researchers, executives and marketing people are now using the expression without irony or inverted commas.
sentences.translation: 研究人员、高管和营销人员如今使用这个词时不带讽刺意味，也不加引号。

structure.text: Researchers, executives and marketing people
are now using the expression
without irony or inverted commas

difficult_points: 三个名词并列作主语。
without...or...说明使用时没有两种附加态度。

sentences.sentence: And it is not always hype.
sentences.translation: 而且这并不总是炒作。

structure.text: it
is not always hype

difficult_points: it 指对 AI 一词的重新使用。
hype 表示夸张宣传或炒作。

sentences.sentence: The term is being applied, with some justification, to products that depend on technology that was originally developed by AI researchers.
sentences.translation: 这个词被有一定依据地用于那些依赖最初由人工智能研究者开发的技术的产品。

structure.text: The term
is being applied, with some justification, to products
that depend on technology that was originally developed by AI researchers

difficult_points: is being applied 是进行时被动。
两个 that 定语从句分别修饰 products 和 technology。

sentences.sentence: Admittedly, the rehabilitation of the term has a long way to go, and some firms still prefer to avoid using it.
sentences.translation: 诚然，这个词要恢复声誉还有很长的路要走，而且一些公司仍然更愿意避免使用它。

structure.text: Admittedly
the rehabilitation of the term has a long way to go
and some firms still prefer to avoid using it

difficult_points: Admittedly 表示承认一个让步事实。
prefer to avoid using 中 using 是 avoid 的动名词宾语。

expressions.text: have a long way to go

sentences.sentence: But the fact that others are starting to use it again suggests that AI has moved on from being seen as an over-ambitious and under-achieving field of research.
sentences.translation: 但其他人开始再次使用它这一事实表明，人工智能已经不再被视为一个野心过大却成就不足的研究领域。

structure.text: the fact that others are starting to use it again
that others are starting to use it again
suggests that AI has moved on from being seen as an over-ambitious and under-achieving field of research
that AI has moved on from being seen as an over-ambitious and under-achieving field of research

difficult_points: 主语包含 fact 后的 that 从句。
suggests 后又接 that 从句说明结论。
move on from 表示摆脱过去的状态。

sentences.sentence: The field was launched, and the term 'artificial intelligence' coined, at a conference in 1956 by a group of researchers that included Marvin Minsky, John McCarthy, Herbert Simon and Alan Newell, all of whom went on to become leading figures in the field.
sentences.translation: 这个领域在1956年的一次会议上由一群研究者创立，“人工智能”一词也在会上被创造；这群人包括马文·明斯基等人，他们后来都成为该领域的领军人物。

structure.text: The field was launched, and the term 'artificial intelligence' coined
at a conference in 1956 by a group of researchers
that included Marvin Minsky, John McCarthy, Herbert Simon and Alan Newell
all of whom went on to become leading figures in the field

difficult_points: the term coined 省略了 was，和 field was launched 并列。
两个定语从句分别修饰 researchers 和前面整组人。
go on to become 表示后来成为。

sentences.sentence: The expression provided an attractive but informative name for a research programme that encompassed such previously disparate fields as operations research, cybernetics, logic and computer science.
sentences.translation: 这个表达为一个研究项目提供了一个吸引人且信息丰富的名称，该项目涵盖运筹学、控制论、逻辑学和计算机科学等此前互不相关的领域。

structure.text: The expression
provided an attractive but informative name for a research programme
that encompassed such previously disparate fields as operations research, cybernetics, logic and computer science

difficult_points: but 连接 attractive 和 informative 两个形容词。
that 定语从句修饰 research programme。
such...as...列举涵盖的领域。

sentences.sentence: The goal they shared was an attempt to capture or mimic human abilities using machines.
sentences.translation: 他们共同的目标是尝试用机器捕捉或模仿人类能力。

structure.text: The goal they shared
they shared
was an attempt to capture or mimic human abilities using machines
using machines

difficult_points: they shared 是省略关系代词的定语从句。
to capture or mimic 是 attempt 的内容，using machines 表方式。

sentences.sentence: That said, different groups of researchers attacked different problems, from speech recognition to chess playing, in different ways; AI unified the field in name only.
sentences.translation: 话虽如此，不同研究群体用不同方式解决不同问题，从语音识别到下棋不等；人工智能只是在名称上统一了这个领域。

structure.text: That said
different groups of researchers attacked different problems
from speech recognition to chess playing
AI unified the field in name only

difficult_points: That said 是让步插入语，意为“话虽如此”。
分号后说明统一只是名义上的。

sentences.sentence: But it was a term that captured the public imagination.
sentences.translation: 但它毕竟是一个激发公众想象力的术语。

structure.text: it
was a term
that captured the public imagination

difficult_points: that 定语从句修饰 term。
capture the public imagination 表示引起公众强烈兴趣。

sentences.sentence: Most researchers agree that AI peaked around 1985.
sentences.translation: 大多数研究人员认为人工智能在1985年前后达到顶峰。

structure.text: Most researchers
agree that AI peaked around 1985
that AI peaked around 1985

difficult_points: agree 后接 that 从句。
peak 作动词表示达到顶峰。

sentences.sentence: A public reared on science-fiction movies and excited by the growing power of computers had high expectations.
sentences.translation: 在科幻电影熏陶下并因计算机日益强大而兴奋的公众抱有很高期望。

structure.text: A public reared on science-fiction movies and excited by the growing power of computers
reared on science-fiction movies
excited by the growing power of computers
had high expectations

difficult_points: 两个过去分词短语共同修饰 public。
reared 表示被培育或熏陶，excited 表示受到激发。

sentences.sentence: For years, AI researchers had implied that a breakthrough was just around the corner.
sentences.translation: 多年来，人工智能研究人员一直暗示突破就在眼前。

structure.text: For years
AI researchers had implied
that a breakthrough was just around the corner

difficult_points: had implied 是过去完成时，表示此前持续的暗示。
around the corner 是“即将到来”的比喻。

sentences.sentence: Marvin Minsky said in 1967 that within a generation the problem of creating 'artificial intelligence' would be substantially solved.
sentences.translation: 马文·明斯基在1967年说，一代人之内创造人工智能的问题将基本得到解决。

structure.text: Marvin Minsky said in 1967
that within a generation the problem of creating 'artificial intelligence' would be substantially solved

difficult_points: that 从句是 said 的宾语。
would be solved 是过去视角下的将来被动。

sentences.sentence: Prototypes of medical-diagnosis programs and speech recognition software appeared to be making progress.
sentences.translation: 医疗诊断程序和语音识别软件的原型似乎正在取得进展。

structure.text: Prototypes of medical-diagnosis programs and speech recognition software
appeared to be making progress

difficult_points: appeared to be making 是“似乎正在取得”的结构。
两个名词短语并列修饰 prototypes。

sentences.sentence: It proved to be a false dawn.
sentences.translation: 事实证明那只是虚假的曙光。

structure.text: It
proved to be
a false dawn

difficult_points: It 指前述看似进展的现象。
false dawn 比喻短暂且并不真实的希望。

sentences.sentence: Thinking computers and household robots failed to materialise, and a backlash ensued.
sentences.translation: 会思考的计算机和家用机器人未能实现，随之出现了反弹。

structure.text: Thinking computers and household robots
failed to materialise
and a backlash ensued

difficult_points: materialise 表示实现或出现。
ensue 表示随后发生，主语 a backlash 是后果。

sentences.sentence: 'There was undue optimism in the early 1980s,' says David Leake, a researcher at Indiana University.
sentences.translation: “20世纪80年代初存在过度乐观，”印第安纳大学研究员戴维·利克说。

structure.text: There was undue optimism in the early 1980s
says David Leake
a researcher at Indiana University

difficult_points: 引号内是直接引语。
a researcher...是说话者的同位语。

sentences.sentence: 'Then when people realised these were hard problems, there was retrenchment.
sentences.translation: “后来人们意识到这些是困难问题时，研究出现了收缩。

structure.text: when people realised these were hard problems
there was retrenchment

difficult_points: when 从句包含 realised 后的宾语从句。
retrenchment 指研究活动或投入的缩减。

sentences.sentence: By the late 1980s, the term AI was being avoided by many researchers, who opted instead to align themselves with specific sub-disciplines such as neural networks, agent technology, case-based reasoning, and so on.'
sentences.translation: 到20世纪80年代末，许多研究人员开始避免使用 AI 一词，转而把自己归入神经网络、智能体技术和基于案例的推理等具体分支。

structure.text: By the late 1980s
the term AI was being avoided by many researchers
who opted instead to align themselves with specific sub-disciplines such as neural networks, agent technology, case-based reasoning, and so on

difficult_points: was being avoided 是过去进行时被动。
who 定语从句说明研究人员转向其他分支的选择。

expressions.meaning_zh: 使自己归入；与……保持一致

sentences.sentence: Ironically, in some ways AI was a victim of its own success.
sentences.translation: 讽刺的是，在某些方面人工智能反而成了自身成功的受害者。

structure.text: Ironically, in some ways
AI
was a victim of its own success

difficult_points: victim of its own success 是悖论式表达。
Ironically 表示结果出人意料。

expressions.text: a victim of one's own success

sentences.sentence: Whenever an apparently mundane problem was solved, such as building a system that could land an aircraft unattended, the problem was deemed not to have been AI in the first place.
sentences.translation: 每当一个看似平凡的问题被解决，例如建造能让飞机无人值守着陆的系统，人们就认为这个问题一开始就不属于人工智能。

structure.text: Whenever an apparently mundane problem was solved
such as building a system that could land an aircraft unattended
the problem was deemed not to have been AI in the first place
that could land an aircraft unattended

difficult_points: Whenever 引导反复发生的时间条件。
was deemed not to have been 是被动判断结构，完成时不定式表示此前就不属于 AI。

sentences.sentence: 'If it works, it can't be AI,' as Dr Leake characterises it.
sentences.translation: “如果它能工作，那就不可能是 AI，”利克博士如此概括。

structure.text: If it works
it can't be AI
as Dr Leake characterises it

difficult_points: 引语是对前句标准的概括。
as 引导方式说明语，it 指这一观点。

sentences.sentence: The effect of repeatedly moving the goal-posts in this way was that AI came to refer to 'blue-sky' research that was still years away from commercialisation.
sentences.translation: 如此反复改变目标的结果是，AI 逐渐指向仍距商业化多年之遥的“蓝天”研究。

structure.text: The effect of repeatedly moving the goal-posts in this way
was that AI came to refer to 'blue-sky' research
that was still years away from commercialisation

difficult_points: repeatedly moving 是动名词短语作 effect 的修饰语。
that 表语从句说明结果，后一个 that 修饰 research。

sentences.sentence: Researchers joked that AI stood for 'almost implemented'.
sentences.translation: 研究人员开玩笑说，AI 代表“几乎实现”。

structure.text: Researchers
joked
that AI stood for 'almost implemented'

difficult_points: that 从句是 joked 的宾语。
stand for 表示代表或缩写为。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, the technologies that made it onto the market, such as speech recognition, language translation and decision-support software, were no longer regarded as AI.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，进入市场的技术，如语音识别、语言翻译和决策支持软件，不再被视为 AI。

structure.text: the technologies that made it onto the market
that made it onto the market
were no longer regarded as AI
such as speech recognition, language translation and decision-support software

difficult_points: that 定语从句修饰 technologies。
were regarded as 是被动结构，表示分类标准改变。

sentences.sentence: Yet all three once fell well within the umbrella of AI research.
sentences.translation: 然而，这三者过去都完全属于 AI 研究的范围。

structure.text: all three
once fell well within the umbrella of AI research

difficult_points: all three 指前句列举的三类技术。
within the umbrella of 是“属于……范围”的比喻。

sentences.sentence: But the tide may now be turning, according to Dr Leake.
sentences.translation: 但据利克博士说，形势现在可能正在转变。

structure.text: But
the tide may now be turning
according to Dr Leake

difficult_points: the tide be turning 是形势转变的比喻。
may 表示可能性。

sentences.sentence: HNC Software of San Diego, backed by a government agency, reckon that their new approach to artificial intelligence is the most powerful and promising approach ever discovered.
sentences.translation: 圣迭戈的 HNC 软件公司在一家政府机构支持下，认为其人工智能新方法是迄今发现的最强大、最有前景的方法。

structure.text: HNC Software of San Diego, backed by a government agency
backed by a government agency
reckon that their new approach to artificial intelligence is the most powerful and promising approach ever discovered
ever discovered

difficult_points: backed by...是被动分词短语，补充公司背景。
reckon that 引出公司判断，ever discovered 修饰 approach。

sentences.sentence: HNC claim that their system, based on a cluster of 30 processors, could be used to spot camouflaged vehicles on a battlefield or extract a voice signal from a noisy background - tasks humans can do well, but computers cannot.
sentences.translation: HNC 声称，他们基于30个处理器集群的系统可以在战场发现伪装车辆，或从嘈杂背景中提取声音信号——这些任务人类能做好，但计算机做不到。

structure.text: HNC claim
that their system, based on a cluster of 30 processors, could be used to spot camouflaged vehicles on a battlefield or extract a voice signal from a noisy background
based on a cluster of 30 processors
tasks humans can do well, but computers cannot

difficult_points: based on...修饰 system。
could be used to 后并列两个不定式目的。
tasks 后省略了 computers can do，形成对比省略。

sentences.sentence: 'Whether or not their technology lives up to the claims made for it, the fact that HNC are emphasising the use of AI is itself an interesting development,' says Dr Leake.
sentences.translation: “无论他们的技术是否达到宣传的效果，HNC 强调使用 AI 这一事实本身就是有趣的发展，”利克博士说。

structure.text: Whether or not their technology lives up to the claims made for it
the fact that HNC are emphasising the use of AI is itself an interesting development
that HNC are emphasising the use of AI
says Dr Leake

difficult_points: Whether or not 引导让步从句，意为无论是否。
that 从句说明 fact 的内容。
claims made for it 中 made 修饰 claims。

sentences.sentence: Another factor that may boost the prospects for AI in the near future is that investors are now looking for firms using clever technology, rather than just a clever business model, to differentiate themselves.
sentences.translation: 另一个可能提升 AI 近期前景的因素是，投资者正在寻找使用聪明技术而非仅有聪明商业模式来实现差异化的公司。

structure.text: Another factor that may boost the prospects for AI in the near future
that may boost the prospects for AI in the near future
is that investors are now looking for firms using clever technology, rather than just a clever business model, to differentiate themselves
using clever technology
to differentiate themselves

difficult_points: 主语含有定语从句，表语是 that 从句。
rather than 表示舍弃单一商业模式，to differentiate 表目的。

sentences.sentence: In particular, the problem of information overload, exacerbated by the growth of e-mail and the explosion in the number of web pages, means there are plenty of opportunities for new technologies to help filter and categorise information - classic AI problems.
sentences.translation: 尤其是，电子邮件增长和网页数量爆炸加剧了信息过载问题，这意味着新技术有大量机会帮助筛选和分类信息——这正是典型的 AI 问题。

structure.text: the problem of information overload
exacerbated by the growth of e-mail and the explosion in the number of web pages
means there are plenty of opportunities for new technologies to help filter and categorise information
classic AI problems

difficult_points: exacerbated by 是过去分词短语，修饰 information overload。
means 后接存在句，to help 表示新技术的用途。

sentences.sentence: That may mean that more artificial intelligence companies will start to emerge to meet this challenge.
sentences.translation: 这可能意味着会有更多人工智能公司出现来应对这一挑战。

structure.text: That
may mean that more artificial intelligence companies will start to emerge to meet this challenge
to meet this challenge

difficult_points: That 指信息过载带来的技术机会。
to meet 表目的，说明公司出现的原因。

sentences.sentence: The 1969 film, 2001: A Space Odyssey, featured an intelligent computer called HAL 9000.
sentences.translation: 1969年的电影《2001太空漫游》展示了一台名为 HAL 9000 的智能计算机。

structure.text: The 1969 film, 2001: A Space Odyssey
featured
an intelligent computer called HAL 9000
called HAL 9000

difficult_points: 电影名是主语的同位语。
called HAL 9000 修饰 computer。

sentences.sentence: As well as understanding and speaking English, HAL could play chess and even learned to lip-read.
sentences.translation: 除了理解和说英语外，HAL 还能下棋，甚至学会了读唇语。

structure.text: As well as understanding and speaking English
HAL could play chess and even learned to lip-read

difficult_points: As well as 后接两个并列动名词。
could play 和 learned to lip-read 是并列能力描述。

sentences.sentence: HAL thus encapsulated the optimism of the 1960s that intelligent computers would be widespread by 2001.
sentences.translation: 因此，HAL 集中体现了20世纪60年代的乐观主义：人们相信到2001年智能计算机会广泛存在。

structure.text: HAL
thus encapsulated the optimism of the 1960s
that intelligent computers would be widespread by 2001

difficult_points: that 从句是 optimism 的同位语，说明乐观内容。
would be 是过去视角下对未来的预测。

sentences.sentence: But 2001 has been and gone, and there is still no sign of a HAL-like computer.
sentences.translation: 但2001年已经过去，仍然没有 HAL 式计算机的踪迹。

structure.text: 2001 has been and gone
and there is still no sign of a HAL-like computer

difficult_points: has been and gone 表示某段时间已经过去。
there is no sign of 表示没有迹象。

sentences.sentence: Individual systems can play chess or transcribe speech, but a general theory of machine intelligence still remains elusive.
sentences.translation: 单个系统能够下棋或转录语音，但机器智能的一般理论仍然难以捉摸。

structure.text: Individual systems can play chess or transcribe speech
but a general theory of machine intelligence still remains elusive

difficult_points: can 后并列 play 和 transcribe 两个动词。
remain elusive 表示仍难以实现或找到。

sentences.sentence: It may be, however, that the comparison with HAL no longer seems quite so important, and AI can now be judged by what it can do, rather than by how well it matches up to a 30-year-old science-fiction film.
sentences.translation: 然而，也许与 HAL 的比较已不再那么重要，现在可以根据 AI 能做什么，而不是它与一部30年前科幻电影有多相像来评价它。

structure.text: It may be
that the comparison with HAL no longer seems quite so important
and AI can now be judged by what it can do, rather than by how well it matches up to a 30-year-old science-fiction film
by what it can do
by how well it matches up to a 30-year-old science-fiction film

difficult_points: It may be that 是形式主语结构。
by what...rather than by how...对比评价标准，what 和 how 引导名词性从句。

sentences.sentence: 'People are beginning to realise that there are impressive things that these systems can do,' says Dr Leake hopefully.
sentences.translation: “人们开始意识到，这些系统能够完成令人印象深刻的事情，”利克博士满怀希望地说。

structure.text: People are beginning to realise that there are impressive things that these systems can do
that there are impressive things that these systems can do
that these systems can do
says Dr Leake hopefully

difficult_points: realise 后嵌套 that 从句，内部还有修饰 things 的定语从句。
there are 是存在句，things 是信息中心。
